school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Liam goes with exactly two of Ames, 81%, and Period 5.
Carver's grade is higher than both the class with Noah's grade and the class in Period 1's grade.
Either Ellis goes with 75% or Kira goes with Period 2.
Either Mona goes with Dunn or Ellis goes with Period 2.
Period 1 goes with at least two of Frost, Jonah, and 75%.
Mona goes with exactly two of Ellis, 77%, and Period 3.
Frost's period is between the class with Jonah's period and the class with 77%'s period.
Liam, 79%, and 85% go with Ellis, Frost, and Period 5, in some order.
Between Liam and Period 1, one goes with Ames and the other with Carver.
Exactly one of these is true: Dunn goes with Noah; Jonah goes with 77%; Quinn goes with Period 4.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: French goes with exactly two of Anatoly, 1748, and 2nd.
Garry's rating is higher than both the Pirc player's rating and the player who placed 6th's rating.
Either Magnus goes with 1448 or Caro-Kann goes with 5th.
Either London goes with Judit or Magnus goes with 5th.

London goes with exactly two of Magnus, 1548, and 4th.
Mikhail's placing is between the Benoni player's placing and the 1548-rated player's placing.
French, 1648, and 1948 go with Magnus, Mikhail, and 2nd, in some order.
Between French and 6th, one goes with Anatoly and the other with Garry.
Exactly one of these is true: Judit goes with Pirc; Benoni goes with 1548; Sicilian goes with 3rd.
